brief_summary: Two facing card panels representing the dual-palette mechanic. Left: The Sovereign in deep ocean blue with a row of 8 mini key tiles in the palette, label 'moody · desk-as-furniture'. Right: The Mutation in electric pink with the same 8-tile row, label 'electric · desk-as-instrument'. Central 'or' chip on a dashed divider. Caption: 'choose at checkout · not at IC · two MOQs to clear inside one window'.
data_sources: gmk-cyl-king-of-the-seas-group-buy.mdx § 'Two colorways, one buy' — 'The Sovereign and The Mutation are both available for the duration of the window, and buyers choose at checkout rather than at IC. The mood split is wide on purpose — one moody, one electric ... The desk-as-instrument crowd has been pulling toward saturated synthetic palettes; the desk-as-furniture crowd has been pulling toward muted naturalistic ones.'
gmk-cyl-king-of-the-seas-group-buy.mdx § Callout — 'Each palette has to clear its own GMK minimum independently — they are separate tooling runs at the manufacturer'
